data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a recording option being enabled. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this recording option. The linked use case mentions a recording option but does not provide concrete evidence that it is implemented or operational, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the recording option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify recording option functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the recording option is enabled for the session.
